title: Interpret AGV Flow Through the Hospital Module
summary: Use the training-described hospital queue and tote-handling sequence to interpret expected AGV movement within the hospital area: entrance queue, drop-off when available, movement to pickup, waiting if no tote is present, and exit queue departure.
when_to_use: Use this reference when reviewing training material or observing AGV movement in the hospital area to compare observed movement against the documented hospital flow sequence.
not_for: Do not use this training segment alone to infer undocumented causes of abnormal movement.
Do not use this reference as a corrective-action or recovery procedure when observed AGV behavior does not match the documented sequence.

responsibilities: Review the hospital module diagram or training material.
Observe AGV position relative to the entrance queue, drop-off location, pickup location, and exit queue.
Compare observed AGV movement to the documented sequence and escalate mismatches.

safety_notes: This is a reference procedure derived from training content and is intended for interpretation of AGV flow, not direct control actions.
Do not infer undocumented causes or corrective actions from this training segment alone.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the training slide or diagram for the hospital module
Ability to observe AGV position relative to hospital entrance queue, drop-off, pickup, and exit queue

access_required: Access to the training slide or diagram for the hospital module
system_preconditions: Hospital module flow is being reviewed in training material or by observing AGV movement in the hospital area.

visual_references.description: Training slide/frame showing hospital entrance queue, drop-off, pickup, and exit queue flow within the modularized layout.

steps.title: Identify the hospital flow locations
steps.purpose: Establish the reference points used to interpret AGV movement through the hospital module.
steps.instruction: Locate the hospital portion of the modularization diagram or training material and identify the entrance queue, drop-off location, pickup location, and exit queue.
steps.expected_result: The hospital flow locations are identified on the source diagram or training frame.
steps.healthy_condition: Entrance queue, drop-off, pickup, and exit queue can be visually located in the training material.
steps.failure_condition: The hospital flow locations cannot be clearly identified from the available source material.

actions.label: Review hospital diagram
actions.exact_action: Locate the hospital portion of the modularization diagram or training material and identify the entrance queue, drop-off location, pickup location, and exit queue.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Hospital entrance queue, drop-off location, pickup location, and exit queue labels/flow on the training slide.

stop_or_escalate_if: The hospital entrance queue, drop-off, pickup, or exit queue cannot be identified from the source material.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Transcript explains hospital entrance queue, drop-off if location is free, movement to pickup location, waiting if no tote is present, and then movement to exit queue.

steps.title: Verify entry through the entrance queue
steps.purpose: Confirm the documented first movement in the hospital sequence.
steps.instruction: Confirm that the AGV enters the hospital through the entrance queue before any drop-off or pickup action.
steps.expected_result: The AGV is interpreted as entering the hospital through the entrance queue first.
steps.healthy_condition: Observed or reviewed flow shows the entrance queue preceding drop-off and pickup actions.
steps.failure_condition: Observed movement appears to bypass the entrance queue or starts at an undocumented point.

actions.label: Check entrance sequence
actions.exact_action: Confirm that the AGV enters the hospital through the entrance queue before any drop-off or pickup action.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Hospital entrance queue as the first queue in the hospital flow.

stop_or_escalate_if: Observed AGV movement does not match the documented entrance-first sequence.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Transcript explains hospital entrance queue, drop-off if location is free, movement to pickup location, waiting if no tote is present, and then movement to exit queue.

steps.title: Check drop-off availability and drop-off movement
steps.purpose: Interpret the documented condition for moving into the hospital drop-off location.
steps.instruction: Check whether the drop-off location is free; if it is free, the AGV proceeds there and drops off.
steps.expected_result: When the drop-off location is free, the AGV proceeds to drop-off as described in the training flow.
steps.healthy_condition: The AGV moves from the entrance queue to the drop-off location when that location is free.
steps.failure_condition: The AGV does not proceed to drop-off when the source-described free-location condition is met, or observed behavior does not align with the documented sequence.

actions.label: Assess drop-off availability
actions.exact_action: Check whether the drop-off location is free; if it is free, the AGV proceeds there and drops off.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Hospital drop-off location in relation to the entrance queue and subsequent pickup location.

stop_or_escalate_if: Observed AGV movement does not match the documented drop-off behavior.
The drop-off sequence cannot be reconciled with the training-described flow.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Transcript explains hospital entrance queue, drop-off if location is free, movement to pickup location, waiting if no tote is present, and then movement to exit queue.

steps.title: Verify movement from drop-off to pickup
steps.purpose: Confirm the next documented movement after hospital drop-off.
steps.instruction: After drop-off, verify that the AGV moves to the pickup location.
steps.expected_result: The AGV is observed or interpreted as moving from drop-off to pickup.
steps.healthy_condition: The documented sequence from drop-off to pickup is followed.
steps.failure_condition: The AGV does not move to pickup after drop-off, or movement appears inconsistent with the source-described flow.

actions.label: Check move to pickup
actions.exact_action: After drop-off, verify that the AGV moves to the pickup location.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Path/order from hospital drop-off location to pickup location.

stop_or_escalate_if: Observed AGV movement does not match the documented drop-off-to-pickup sequence.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Transcript explains hospital entrance queue, drop-off if location is free, movement to pickup location, waiting if no tote is present, and then movement to exit queue.

steps.title: Check for tote presence at pickup
steps.purpose: Interpret whether the AGV should perform a pickup at the hospital pickup location.
steps.instruction: Check whether a tote is present at the pickup location; if a tote is there, the AGV picks it up.
steps.expected_result: If a tote is present at pickup, the AGV performs the pickup as described.
steps.healthy_condition: A tote at the pickup location corresponds with AGV pickup behavior.
steps.failure_condition: A tote is present but the AGV does not pick it up, or observed behavior does not match the documented pickup sequence.

actions.label: Inspect pickup tote presence
actions.exact_action: Check whether a tote is present at the pickup location; if a tote is there, the AGV picks it up.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Hospital pickup location where tote presence determines whether pickup occurs.

stop_or_escalate_if: Observed pickup behavior does not match the documented tote-present condition.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Transcript explains hospital entrance queue, drop-off if location is free, movement to pickup location, waiting if no tote is present, and then movement to exit queue.

steps.title: Verify waiting behavior when no tote is present
steps.purpose: Confirm the documented waiting state at pickup when no tote is available.
steps.instruction: If no tote is present, verify that the AGV waits at the pickup location for a tote to be picked up.
steps.expected_result: When no tote is present, the AGV remains at pickup and waits as described in the training flow.
steps.healthy_condition: The AGV waits at the pickup location when no tote is available.
steps.failure_condition: The AGV leaves pickup prematurely or behaves in a way not described by the source when no tote is present.

actions.label: Check pickup wait state
actions.exact_action: If no tote is present, verify that the AGV waits at the pickup location for a tote to be picked up.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Hospital pickup location and the waiting state described when no tote is present.

stop_or_escalate_if: Observed AGV movement does not match the documented waiting behavior at pickup when no tote is present.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Transcript explains hospital entrance queue, drop-off if location is free, movement to pickup location, waiting if no tote is present, and then movement to exit queue.

steps.title: Confirm departure to the exit queue
steps.purpose: Verify the documented final movement out of the hospital process.
steps.instruction: Confirm that after leaving the hospital process, the AGV proceeds to the exit queue.
steps.expected_result: The AGV is observed or interpreted as proceeding to the exit queue after the hospital sequence.
steps.healthy_condition: The hospital flow ends with movement to the exit queue.
steps.failure_condition: The AGV does not proceed to the exit queue or observed departure does not match the documented sequence.

actions.label: Check exit queue departure
actions.exact_action: Confirm that after leaving the hospital process, the AGV proceeds to the exit queue.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Hospital exit queue as the final queue after drop-off/pickup behavior.

stop_or_escalate_if: Observed AGV movement does not match the documented exit-queue departure sequence.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Transcript explains hospital entrance queue, drop-off if location is free, movement to pickup location, waiting if no tote is present, and then movement to exit queue.

success_criteria: The user can identify the hospital entrance queue, drop-off location, pickup location, and exit queue from the source material.
The user can trace the documented AGV sequence through the hospital area and compare observed movement to the source-described flow.
healthy_conditions: AGV enters the hospital through the entrance queue before drop-off or pickup.
If the drop-off location is free, the AGV proceeds there and drops off.
After drop-off, the AGV moves to the pickup location.
If a tote is present at pickup, the AGV picks it up.
If no tote is present, the AGV waits at the pickup location.
After leaving the hospital process, the AGV proceeds to the exit queue.
failure_conditions: Observed AGV movement does not match the documented entrance, drop-off, pickup, wait, and exit sequence.
The hospital flow locations cannot be clearly identified from the source material.
The source segment is insufficient to determine the cause of abnormal movement or the corrective action to take.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the observed AGV movement does not match the documented entrance, drop-off, pickup, wait, and exit sequence.
Do not infer undocumented causes or corrective actions from this training segment alone.
Escalate to an appropriate support or supervisory role for interpretation beyond the documented training flow if observed behavior differs from the source.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Overall hospital module flow showing entrance queue, drop-off, pickup, waiting behavior, and exit queue.
